steamSub: Double-click an account to switch — steam-mate closes Steam, rewrites its login, and relaunches signed in.
rowTitle: Double-click to switch to this account
folderTitle: Click to open or close this group
legendFolder: Folder — accounts that share a name
toastLinkedAll: {n} accounts now read the shared cache.
toastLinkedAllSkipped: {n} linked · {k} skipped (folder still holds its own files)
assignTitle: Pick the Steam account this game profile belongs to
sdelForgetDN: Removes each account's saved login from this disk. Each needs its password next time.
toastHideN: {n} accounts hidden in steam-mate. Steam still remembers them.
toastForgetN: Forgot {n} accounts on this disk. Each needs its password next time.
delBodyN: Each selected profile's data and saves are removed, and its row leaves accounts.csv. This cannot be undone.
delSteamLabelN: Also forget the assigned Steam accounts ({k})
cacheNoneDesc: LocalData\DATA\0000 does not exist. Create it so every account can share one copy of the download.
createBody: LocalData\DATA\0000 becomes the one copy of the game's download that every linked account reads.
createSeedD: A rename on the same disk — instant, nothing copied or downloaded again. That profile becomes the first linked account.
createEmptyD: Creates the folder skeleton (root + 256 hash folders); the game downloads the cache once, into the shared folder, on its next launch.
createNoSeed: No profile holds its own files.
errNoCache: No shared cache yet — create it first.
toastCreateSeed: Moved the cache of {n} here and linked it. Nothing was copied.
toastCreateEmpty: Created the empty folder skeleton. The game downloads into it once, on the next launch.
mdSub: Link an account's 0000 folder to the shared asset cache — the same folder link mklink /J makes — so one ~13 GB download serves every Konami account. The folder appears after the game's first launch under that Steam account; hit Refresh to pick it up.
cacheDesc: 256 hash folders + root — every linked account points here.
guardHtml: Master Duel is running. Linking, deleting, and editing are off while masterduel.exe is open — close the game to make changes.
mdHint: Click a name to rename · assign each profile its Steam account
sdelHideD: Steam still remembers the login. The row moves to a hidden list in steam-mate's settings and can be restored anytime.
sdelForgetD: Removes {a} from loginusers.vdf — the same thing Steam's own "Forget" does. The next login asks for the password and Steam Guard again.
delBody: Removes LocalData\{id}{linked}, its saves (LocalSave\{id} — decks and collection), and its row in accounts.csv. This cannot be undone. The shared cache is not touched.
delBodyLinked: (its link is removed first — the delete never enters the shared cache)
delSteamDesc: Forgets that login on this disk (loginusers.vdf) — the next sign-in asks for the password and Steam Guard.
expDesc: The account list — folder id, name, link state — as JSON. Nothing on disk changes. In the real app this opens a "Save as…" dialog.
toastClear2: The next Steam launch shows the login screen.
toastSwitch2: Signed in as {a}{off} — Steam is restarting.
confirmForce:
LocalData\{id}\0000 already contains files.

Link anyway? The folder is deleted and replaced by a link to the shared cache (force=true).
errRunning: Master Duel is running — close it first.
errCopy: Copy failed — the clipboard is unavailable.
errBatchSkipped: {n} profiles could not be deleted and were left untouched.
toastDelBoth: {n} removed — saves deleted, Steam account forgotten.
caption: Interactive preview of steam-mate v0.1, filled with the real accounts on this machine. Double-click an account to switch; open the 烙印 folder (6 Steam logins, 18 Master Duel accounts share that name); try Refresh, the per-row Delete… buttons, Export accounts…, the running guard — and the four-language switcher in the sidebar.
